pi_items.source: Task description and verifier logic explicitly require saving to this path.
Task description and export script explicitly define this report path.
Setup script copies the downloaded dataset to this exact path.

The provided dataset (from the 4. Regression folder) only contains 5 aggregated columns (Neuroticism, Extraversion, Openness, Agreeableness, Conscientiousness). It lacks the individual item columns (E1-E5) required by the task description to perform the ANOVA, making it impossible to compute any Bayes Factor.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires performing a Bayesian Repeated Measures ANOVA on variables E1 through E5. However, the dataset provided to the agent (/home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv) is the '4. Regression' version of the Big Five dataset, which only contains aggregated traits (Neuroticism, Extraversion, Openness, Agreeableness, Conscientiousness) and lacks the item-level columns (E1-E5). Thus, the required analysis cannot be performed and the claimed minimum Bayes factor is moot.
